compiled_state.title: GREEN: update validate-review-output.sh schema to accept review_tier field
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## TDD Requirement
Make RED tests from task f493-bf4e pass.

## Implementation
- Update the schema validation in validate-review-output.sh to accept review_tier as an optional top-level field
- review_tier must be one of: light, standard, deep (if present)
- Absence of review_tier should NOT cause validation failure (graceful absence)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Findings JSON with review_tier=standard passes validation
  Verify: echo '{"scores":...,"findings":[],"summary":"...","review_tier":"standard"}' | validate-review-output.sh ...

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — validate-review-output.sh already updated by task 5e1d-3705 to accept review_tier field. All 66 tests pass (0 failures). AC verified.
comments.author: Main
